name: @schlp/open-meteo-mcp-ts
description: Open-Meteo MCP Server - Weather data via Model Context Protocol

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/air_quality.test.ts tests/client.test.ts tests/geocoding.test.ts tests/helpers.test.ts tests/meteo_improvements.test.ts tests/models.test.ts tests/server.test.ts tests/server_tool_calls.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --import tsx --watch --test tests/air_quality.test.ts tests/client.test.ts tests/geocoding.test.ts tests/helpers.test.ts tests/meteo_improvements.test.ts tests/models.test.ts tests/server.test.ts tests/server_tool_calls.test.ts
scripts.coverage: node --import tsx --test --coverage tests/air_quality.test.ts tests/client.test.ts tests/geocoding.test.ts tests/helpers.test.ts tests/meteo_improvements.test.ts tests/models.test.ts tests/server.test.ts tests/server_tool_calls.test.ts

author: Open Meteo Contributors
